repo_prior_art.cite: pid_did_anticipation_bounded_v1 is observed-cohort bounded anticipation, not latent adoption-date refinement

published_prior_art.cite: CallawaySantAnna2021 and SunAbraham2021 identify known-cohort/event-time objects; AugustinGutknechtLiu2025 studies misclassified histories and anticipation but not Gamma_lambda(P) sharp endpoints over interval refinements
ManskiTamer2002/general partial-identification logic: a scalar sign is identified iff the sharp set lies on one side of zero

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_did_anticipation_bounded_v1 varies anticipation with observed cohorts, not observationally equivalent latent timing refinements with opposite exact-event signs

published_prior_art.cite: GoodmanBacon2021 and DeChaisemartinDHaultfoeuille2020 diagnose observed-timing TWFE sign distortions; AugustinGutknechtLiu2025 is adjacent misclassification work but does not subsume this exact-refinement nonidentification witness

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Endpoint attainment is not well-posed under Assumption denom as written: Theta_I(P) excludes D_e(kappa)=0 by a strict condition, so the optimization domain need not be closed; add a uniform denominator lower bound, restrict to closed admissible faces, or define closure/extended endpoints.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The singleton-bin theorem omits the share-consistency and nonzero-denominator conditions needed for K(P) and Theta_I(P) to be nonempty under the setup's optional r_{c,g} restrictions.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Patch Assumption denom into a closed admissible-domain condition, e.g. D_e(kappa) >= d_e > 0 for all target event times on the feasible set, or explicitly state endpoints over the closure and characterize which boundary ratios are allowed.

Add a short lemma separating the single-coordinate linear-fractional case from the multi-event rational case; if the extreme-point certificate is only guaranteed for common-denominator contrasts, downgrade the general multi-event sentence to a conjectured finite candidate search or a separate restricted conjecture.

Anchor the Augustin-Gutknecht-Liu comparison to the exact section/result on misclassified staggered histories and explicitly state why their estimand is an estimator-bias target rather than the sharp support of theta(kappa).

recommended_next_step: Revise the denominator/share-consistency assumptions and narrow the extreme-point certificate to the domain where endpoint attainment is mathematically closed.
